post.summary: Re-enqueue dead-lettered messages matching the query for reprocessing.

DeadLetterSummaryDto.description:
Redacted projection of a Wolverine DeadLetterEnvelope.
The message body (`Envelope` and `Message` on the source type) is intentionally
excluded because integration events such as `PasswordResetRequestedV1`
and `EmailChangeRequestedV1` carry single-use
security tokens. Exposing the raw payload to any admin who can call this API would
allow token theft without touching the Users module.

DeadLetterSummaryResultsDto.description:
Redacted projection of DeadLetterEnvelopeResults.
`DatabaseUri` is excluded to avoid leaking internal infrastructure details.

message.default: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

ForgotPasswordResponse.description: Always returned — even when the email is not found — to prevent enumeration.

message.default: Logged out from all devices successfully.

LogoutAllResponse.description: No request body needed — the authenticated user's ID comes from the JWT.

message.default: Registration successful. Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
If that email address is available, a confirmation link has been sent to it.

RequestEmailChangeResponse.description: Always returned — even when the email is taken — to prevent enumeration.

message.default: If an account exists and needs confirmation, a confirmation email has been sent.
